name: io.github.stanislawherjan1/gdocs-comments-mcp
description: Add inline, range-anchored comments to Google Docs — leave feedback, notes, or review comments pinned to specific passages. The one comment operation the Google Docs/Drive APIs cannot do; drives a real logged-in Docs session via Playwright. For AI agents that review or give feedback on documents.

environmentVariables.name: GDOCS_COMMENTS_CDP_URL
environmentVariables.description: Attach to an existing browser over CDP instead of managing a profile
